SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class AcceptanceResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.AcceptanceResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class AcceptanceResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of an overpressure accumulation acceptance check against the ASME VIII Div 1 / TR3001 section 2 accumulated-pressure limits.

The check compares a peak (relieving) pressure against the maximum allowable accumulated pressure, which is the protected item MAWP multiplied by the applicable accumulation factor (110% single non-fire device, 116% multiple non-fire devices, 121% fire case).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • AcceptanceResult

      public AcceptanceResult(double peakPressureBara, double allowableAccumulatedPressureBara, double accumulationFraction, boolean accepted, double marginBara, String basis)
      Creates an immutable acceptance result.
      Parameters:
      peakPressureBara - the peak (relieving) pressure in bara
      allowableAccumulatedPressureBara - the maximum allowable accumulated pressure in bara
      accumulationFraction - the accumulation factor applied (for example 1.10, 1.16, 1.21)
      accepted - true if the peak pressure does not exceed the allowable accumulated pressure
      marginBara - the margin (allowable minus peak) in bara; negative when exceeded
      basis - a short text describing the acceptance basis

  • Method Details

    • getPeakPressureBara

      public double getPeakPressureBara()
      Gets the peak (relieving) pressure used in the check.
      Returns:
      the peak pressure in bara

    • getAllowableAccumulatedPressureBara

      public double getAllowableAccumulatedPressureBara()
      Gets the maximum allowable accumulated pressure.
      Returns:
      the allowable accumulated pressure in bara

    • getAccumulationFraction

      public double getAccumulationFraction()
      Gets the accumulation factor applied to the MAWP.
      Returns:
      the accumulation factor (dimensionless)

    • isAccepted

      public boolean isAccepted()
      Indicates whether the peak pressure is acceptable.
      Returns:
      true if accepted

    • getMarginBara

      public double getMarginBara()
      Gets the acceptance margin (allowable minus peak).
      Returns:
      the margin in bara; negative when the limit is exceeded

    • getBasis

      public String getBasis()
      Gets the short text describing the acceptance basis.
      Returns:
      the acceptance basis string
